address: Phanit Wattana Road, Tambon Jong Kham, Amphoe Muang, Mae Hong Son 58000

description.en: Authentic early morning market on Phanit Wattana Road where Shan and Karen hill tribe vendors sell Burmese curries, Shan tofu, fresh produce, and traditional medicines. The most culturally immersive food experience in town.
description.nl: Authentieke vroege ochtendmarkt op Phanit Wattana Road waar Shan- en Karen-bergstamverkopers Burmese curry's, Shan-tofu, verse producten en traditionele medicijnen verkopen. De meest cultureel onderdompelende eetervaring in het stadje.

metaTitle.en: Mae Hong Son Morning Market - Top Attraction in Mae Hong Son | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Mae Hong Son Ochtendmarkt - Top Attractie in Mae Hong Son | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Discover Mae Hong Son Morning Market. Authentic market with Shan and Karen vendors selling Burmese curries and local produce.
metaDescription.nl: Ontdek Mae Hong Son Ochtendmarkt. Authentieke markt met Shan- en Karen-verkopers die Burmese curry's en lokale producten verkopen.
